description: The Value Filter Invalid node takes in an expected value and a fallback value. If the expected value is not valid (such as ``NaN``, ``Infinity``, or ``-Infinity``), then the fallback value will be used as the output.

fields.Value: The value that may have a chance of being invalid.
fields.Fallback: The fallback value if our provided value is invalid (by entering ``NaN``, ``Infinity``, or ``-Infinity``).
